---
name: gsap-skills-install
description: "Install the GSAP skills pack with npx. Use when you need to add https://github.com/greensock/gsap-skills to this workspace."
---

# GSAP Skills Install

## When to Use
- Add the GSAP skills pack to this workspace
- Setting up GSAP-related Copilot workflows

## Procedure
1. Run the [install script](./scripts/install.ps1), or run `npx skills add https://github.com/greensock/gsap-skills` directly.
